steps.title: Express blue beads from each container
steps.content:
Blue beads from the first container = 40% of x = 0.4x
Blue beads from the second container = 60% of y = 0.6y
Total blue beads combined = 0.4x + 0.6y

steps.title: Translate the constraint
steps.content:
The problem states the containers have at least 500 blue beads. The phrase at least means greater than or equal to. Therefore, the inequality is:
$$0.4x + 0.6y \geq 500$$
A is correct.
